name: codex-bridge-reporter
description: Registers active Codex chats with the local Stream Deck bridge and keeps their status updated.

interface.shortDescription: Mirror Codex chat state to the local Stream Deck bridge
interface.longDescription: Use a lightweight skill and helper scripts to register each Codex chat with the local bridge, keep heartbeats alive, publish progress, and signal when user input is needed.
defaultPrompt: Register this Codex chat with the local Stream Deck bridge and keep the status current.
